title.en: After a period of time, Ye Tian really found ou...

content.en:
Ye Tian was looking for a creature with a perfect-level ancestral endowment, and he was not looking for it indiscriminately.

He first spent some Perfect Crystals to find out the information and understand the situation, so that he could find the Perfect Grade Ancestral Fu.

After a period of time, Ye Tian really found out some information.

There are several very powerful lifeforms in the Ruins of Eternity, which can grow to a half-step perfect master, and such a powerful life may have a perfect-level ancestor.

Of course, this is not necessarily the case.

For example, the Void Snake that Ye Tian encountered before, the other party did not have a perfect-level ancestral endowment.

However, if most of a race can grow to the level of a half-step perfect master, then the probability of this race having a perfect-level ancestor is very high.

"Ouroboros!"

"Ten Wu!"

"Nameless Kun!"

These are the three incomparably terrifying creatures that Ye Tian has discovered.

Among them, the Ouroboros has a terrifying devouring ability, and has a terrifying immortal ability, and if an Ouroboros does not fall, it can almost grow to the level of a half-step perfect controller, even if the top half-step perfect controller wants to kill a title-tailed snake, it is extremely difficult.

After all, Ouroboros' recovery ability is too terrifying, and for half-step perfect controllers, their bodies are also almost immortal.

How powerful the half-step perfect controller is, being able to face the attack of the half-step perfect master, and can also show an immortal body, you can imagine how terrifying their immortal ability is!

And the Ten Shou Wu is a kind of Wu with ten heads, with the terrifying ability of fire to the extreme, and it is extremely fast, growing to the level of a half-step perfect master, and its speed is even faster than many top half-step perfect masters.

The most terrifying thing about it is that once it eats a certain cultivator, unless it is a perfect controller, you can remember the name of the cultivator, otherwise no one else can remember the name of the cultivator, which means that the existence of the cultivator has been erased by the nameless kun, and even relatives and wives cannot remember his existence, and any traces of this cultivator in the classics, inheritance, and memory will be completely erased, as if they had never come to this world.

At first, people were unaware of the Nameless Kun's abilities, until an apprentice of the Perfect Controller was devoured by the Nameless Kun, and its abilities were revealed.

For many Eternal Masters, they are not necessarily afraid of falling, but they are absolutely afraid that their traces will be erased and that they will not leave any behind.

Especially those who have relatives in the eternal control, once they are devoured by the nameless kun, all traces are erased, and everyone does not remember him, how sad it must be!

Therefore, the life that people fear the most, the nameless kun must be ranked among the top few.

"The nameless kun is hard to find, but the Ouroboros and the Ten Shou Wu can still be found!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the Heavenly River of the Ruins of Eternity, there is the Ouroboros clan, and the Ten Sacred Snakes are said to be in the Land of the Blood Sun not far from the Ruins of Eternity.

"Let's go to the Heavenly River first!"

Ye Tian decided.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian went to the Heavenly Chaos River and did not tell the Master Ten Elements Ancestor.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to come to the Heavenly River.

The River of Heavenly Chaos is an incomparably long river in the Ruins of Eternity, longer than the Boundary River of the Origin Realm Sea, running through many time and space, and if an ordinary Eternal Controller enters, it will not be able to fly out.

There are many special powerful beings in the Heavenly River, and of course, there are also many eternal controllers who enter the Heavenly River to find resources, and according to what he knows, the eternal controllers who dare to enter the Heavenly River are also the Seven Realms-level controllers.

After all, the interior of the Heavenly River is also very dangerous, and if the strength is too weak, it will be too easy to fall.

Wow!

Ye Tian cast an instant shadow and directly entered the Heavenly Chaos River.

Bang!!!!

The power of the Heavenly Chaos River collapsed, making Ye Tian feel a faint pressure, which was the pressure from the Heaven and Earth of the Heavenly Chaos River.

Soon, Ye Tian adapted to the suppression of heaven and earth here, and it had almost no impact.

Although the Ouroboros is in the Heavenly Chaos River, Ye Tian is not clear where it is in the Heavenly Chaos River.

"Look for it slowly, there is a copy talent, it shouldn't be long before you can find the Ouroboros, I just hope it really has a perfect-level ancestral endowment!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian was constantly shuttling through the Heavenly Chaos River, and he didn't deal with other Eternal Controllers or half-step Perfect Controllers, once he encountered them, he avoided them so as not to encounter any trouble.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian found many areas of the Heavenly Chaos River.

With the speed of his fleeting, the speed at which he probed the area was fast.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian's replication talent sensed the existence of the Ouroboros.

"Found it, and it really has a perfect-level ancestral endowment!!"

Moreover, what made Ye Tian extremely excited was that this title-tailed snake had two perfect level ancestral endowments.

【Perfect Grade Ancestral Endowment: Devouring】

Perfect Grade Ancestral Fu: Immortal

Ye Tian saw these two perfect level ancestral endowments, so he naturally didn't say a word, and directly copied them.

Soon, the Perfect-level Ancestral Fu Devouring and the Perfect-level Ancestral Immortal were all copied by Ye Tian.

However, he did not leave immediately.

He also wanted to copy the perfect-level ancestral endowments of other Ouroboros, even if they could not be fused into more advanced talents, but they could be given to his relatives.

Therefore, the perfect-level ancestor endowment, even if it is the same talent, he will not dislike it.

This area was the area where Ouroboros liked to stay, so it didn't take long for Ye Tian to find more than a dozen Ouroboros and copy their perfect-level ancestors one by one, but he didn't attack them.

this day.

Ye Tian's copying talent suddenly sensed an incomparably terrifying perfect-level ancestral endowment, as if it was like that terrifying powerhouse in the White Bone Abyss.

"Comparable to the Ouroboros at the level of the perfect controller, no wonder no one dares to come here to hunt the Ouroboros, it really has a backer!"

Ye Tian exclaimed.

There is no such Ouroboros at the level of a perfect controller among the information he probed, so it can be seen that the information may not be accurate.

"It's time to go!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The other party seems to have discovered him, but they didn't attack him.

However, if he stays here, who knows if there will be problems.

So, Ye Tian quickly cast a flash and left.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to return to Tai Ying City.

Immediately, Ye Tian began to fuse the Perfect-level Ancestral Fu Devouring and Immortal, turning it into his own Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment.

Rumble!!!!

A burst of pain struck, and soon these two perfect-level ancestral endowments were successfully fused by Ye Tian one by one.

In this way, in addition to copying talents, Ye Tian now has three perfect-level ancestral endowments, and his foundation has become even stronger.
